entry.title: SAP PI REST-Sender Adapter Custom Error Handling Expression (Glob) SP28 - limited function?
entry.content:
Hi,

i'm implementing a REST to ABAP Proxy scenario on PI 7.5 single stack.

The GET operation of my service provides the customer id in the uri. The backend returns the customer data. In case of providing a non existing customer to the backend, the consumer would expect a http 404 not found. As backend ABAP Proxy can either send back an empty message or a http 500 (raise exception) i implemented a fault message type which is filled with some information about the error when raising the exception.
With this information the idea is to steer the http status code in error handling of the rest adapter with use of JSON Expression by reading a specific field in the payload.
The error payload look like this:


The expectation is, that i can read the value in element "status". If the payload value fits to the value in Expression(Glob) field, the adapter should trow http404


But unfortunately this is not working. The http status is not changed, it's still 500.
The only setup where i have a result is following:


Then i get a http 404:

Does anybody know, what I can use in the field Expression (Glob) in the error handling?

I tried *04, ?04, "404", nothing worked and after googling, chatgpting and reading a bunch of blogs i'm out of ideas.
Does anybody have sort of?
Thanks a lot
florgodi

entry.title: Re: Payment run; clearing journal entry
entry.content:
Hi @ivangomez ,

my colleague Edna has answered some aspects of your request. I'd like to ask though, is there a business reason why you cannot take advantage of the "payment proposal" feature of the application? According to SAP Fiori Apps Reference Library, proposals would allow you to investigate a "draft" of the payment run before it creates actual payment media. SAP considers this review of proposals one of the best practices preventing "damage" and the need for reversals down the road.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: General Release of SAP Analytics Cloud compass
entry.content: 🙌 @ChenNee

entry.title: Reforma tributária Brasil - Atualizações ERP
entry.content:
Boa tarde, Pessoal.

Gostaria  de uma ajuda , sou novo por aqui, já existem alguns fóruns específicos, que estejam fazendo estudos sobre as mudanças de processos e sistema ERP para atender a reforma tributária na SAP?

Como faço para ser incluído neste fóruns?

entry.title: Re: How to use the OData Client Proxy in SAP S/4 HANA or How to use the OData Service Consumption Mo
entry.content:
As a workaround, I managed to call the odata v2 service using a local proxy instead.

However, for odata v4, I am still getting the same error as before.

entry.title: Re: what is Fieldglass Tenant Truststore?
entry.content: Thanks a lot for your response

entry.title: Re: Basic Credit Management (BD6): Exlcude a payment term (prepayments) from credit limit calculatio
entry.content: Hi @Simon, aren't prepayments already automatically excluded from automated credit checks? AFAIK, only payment conditions which actually require credit are subject to checks. Did you have a different experience? Please let us know. Thank you

entry.title: Re: Sysdate On default Prompt Date on SAP Universe
entry.content:
Since this will be a very useful prompt for multiple reports, I suggest coding it within the universe.

I am going to assume you are using Information Design Tool (IDT) for your universe development.  If you are still using Universe Design Tool (UDT), you create an object with a prompt and logic that uses the system date if the prompt if empty.  Let me know if more details are needed here.

In IDT, go to Parameters and Lists of Values.  Create a parameter, type in the desired prompt text, set it to a date data type, under Set default values, select a formula and type in the SQL to provide the system date in your database.  If you happen to have a calendar table that contains all valid dates, set that as the Associated List of Values but this is not required.

In your reports, set a condition where the desired date object = this new parameter.  It will prompt you for a date and default to the system date.

entry.title: Re: Improve Community 2024 feed to append "and X other people" to "mentioned you&quot
entry.content: Affected me as well, that is annoying. You can turn off being tagged globally

entry.title: Upcoming change in Master Template usage activation for PDI User ByD
entry.content:
As you might be aware that with the release 2411 we introduced some changes in the form template upload functionalities

 

The change was as follows

all active buttons which would trigger a background job or change on the forms itself are inactive in the UI for PDI Development users.

All Standard Business User without those authorizations can use the functionality as before fully.

Based on Customer feedback we saw that if a PDI-Development User uploaded a form via SDK and then want to activate the  Master template usage via:

WOC:Application and User 

View: Master Templates

click on action 

Change Master template usage the "Use Master Template" activation box is inactive.

we will allow only this functionality via HF Collection 3 for PDI Development User and the deployment plan is the weekend 18-19 January 2025

 

Until the deployment, activation should be done as a Standard Business User

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI for Java 8.10 on the Horizon
entry.content:
I'm just the outward face, but the work is done by very dedicated and experienced colleagues in the background. The credit goes to them.

Regarding system colors, please try according to 
https://help.sap.com/docs/sap_gui_for_java/e665f2b67dbd4328ab6bd9e029b84581/240814a7ec774eeca7fbd4254f2a0927.html , section "System Colors" or try out rev 1 once it is available, there it is more intuitive.
For the modal dialogs, please raise a support case.

entry.title: SAP Build is ignoring the annotations of the CDS view
entry.content:
I have a custom CDS view in S/4 with UI annotations. In SAP Build Code, I tried creating a list page as a SAP Fiori application, and a Full-Stack application. In both cases the application ignores the UI annotations.

I have access to another subaccount that does not have SAP Build, and there I can create a list page that does not ignore the UI annotations of the CDS view.

Is this an issue with SAP Build Code, or is there some action I need to undertake or a setting to adjust?

entry.title: why changes made to IDOC_DATA in exit_sapliedp_001 is not retained?
entry.content:
In  the IDOC type REMADV inside the customer exit- exit_sapliedp_001, I am making some changes to the value of a segment but when the IDOC is posted those values are not retained in the IDOC_DATA[ ] which is provided as a tables parameter. Can anyone help.

 

Thanks,

Prasenjit

entry.title: Re: SAP ALM API & Integration: Tasks/Defects/Requirements to Jira
entry.content:
Another observation after implementing the bi-directional integration-

1. Any task type in Cloud ALM (Project task, roadmap taak, user story, requirement, etc.) is converted into Jira Task, tak type update is given in the description of Jira, same is applicable for status.

2. To generate one to one mapping of User story to Jira user story, Requirement to Jira Epic, one will have to create mappings.

3. Status updates are also given in Jira task description, Jira task status remains unchanged with the standard mapping given. Customize mapping for status change.

entry.title: Re: Enhancement or BADI for E1IDB02 IDoc segment
entry.content: wrong

entry.title: Re: Enhancement or BADI for E1IDB02 IDoc segment
entry.content: REMADV - EXIT_SAPLIEDP_101/102

entry.title: SAP GUI Scripting after MS VBScripting Depercation?
entry.content:
MS announced in 2023 that it is in the process of deprecating VBScript (see: Deprecated features in the Windows client | Microsoft Learn). SAP GUI Scripting uses and makes calls to MS VBScript that will no longer be included in Windows OS sometime around 2027 (see MS Tech Community Blog: VBScript deprecation: Timelines and next steps | Windows IT Pro Blog). What is SAP doing to ensure all the SAP GUI Scripts that have been created will continue to work?

I've been tasked with creating some new SAP GUI Scripts and worried that they are a dead end.

Thanks,
Byron

entry.title: Re: Content Repository Migration in mind ? Part III
entry.content:
Hi , we have a content server on premise and we need to migrate it to BTS DMS in RISE, what is the better approach to migrate it and not lose the data already stated in CS on premise?

 

thanks,

 

jhan

entry.title: Enabling Identity Authentication integration in LMS
entry.content:
Good afternoon team,

I would like to share with you the following new feature presented in LMS:

Currently, the client has completed most of the steps for the migration process to the LMS IAS, but still has to activate the integration of Identity Authentication in learning. Likewise, the moment in which the process is started, the following new feature is shown in the images:

Once we select the verify button, the following error is generated:

We found indications in the SAP notes, which refer to configuring the default user source system and the rules user.connector.defaultValue.lms-origin and sfuser.connector.defaultValue.lms-origin, this in LMS.

 

 

 

As shown in the attached images, both the default user source system and the referred rules are blank, this is because the client has internal user types (SuccessFactors) and external (learning-only users).

Someone who has experienced this novelty, who can give us advice or support.

I remain attentive.

Cordially,

entry.title: Re: Schedule Post Closing and Opening Balances - Italy
entry.content:
Hi Kamil,

I misunderstood your question, sorry about that. According to the following Help link for Italy, https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/4603118feda9495892abadbe8f8c3d14/ec35db71b5bc49db830c2f245b96441b.html

With this app you can create closing and opening entries for a change in fiscal year.

You can use this app to:

  • Create postings for year-end closing of the profit and loss statements for the fiscal year result.
  • Create postings for closing and opening the balance sheet accounts for the new fiscal year.

Note To ensure that the posting logic meets the legal requirements for Italy, make sure that you do the following:

  • In the app, you must use the variant SAP&ITALY (Standard Variant for Italy) or a modified copy of this variant.
  • In the scheduling app, instead of selecting a variant, you must select the country/region-specific job template Closing/Opening Postings at Year End (Italy).

There are not any specific emphasizing descriptions for ledgers in this app in the help portal documentation.

Following KBA note is regarding to this app and please refer to it in case you met similar issues.

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3434269

Kind Regards,

Lucy

entry.title: How to find data source, extractor, CDS views for time info object
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I like to know how do I find the data sources, extractors and CDS views which has any time characteristics. In other words I like to know that my time related info objects such as 0calmonth or 0calweek or 0fiscper info objects how do I know in which data sources, extractors and CDS views are using these info objects.

If I go to "where used-list" I dont see this information but only ADSO, Queries transformations etc.

I know there is a table name RSOSFIELDMAP which we can use in classic BW, t-code SE 11 to see the mapping from data sources for an object but this t-code is not working for me in BW 4/HANA.

Do I have to use Eclipse or HANA studio or can I use RSA1 in BW 4/HANA environment.

Thanks and much appreciated.

Regards

entry.title: Restrict Access Request creation for a particular Connector
entry.content:
We are on GRC 12.0 and have a cluttered configuration. I have an urgent requirement to restrict IAM team from Access request creation for one particular connector.

Example: For ECC production we have ECC1 & ECC2 Connector names and while creating access request say for a new user, both connectors comes as an option.

ECC2 ends up in some error and user ID is not created. Hence we want to remove that under drop down and keep only ECC1 as an option to avoid any confusion. 

We can't delete ECC2 completely using SPRO>>Common Component Settings>>Integration Framework>>Maintain Connectors, because its very old config and ECC2 is configured for EAM and actively used. Might be ECC2 being used for anything else.

Looking for suggestion for quick fix, only specific to restricting drop down menu with ECC2 connector. Can we can delete ECC2 from GRC >>Access Control>>Maintain Connector Settings particularly for Access Request ?

If not then, what all option we have?

(This will be a temporary fix, and we are planning on long term to streamline all config settings)

entry.title: prevent transport owner from transporting to production
entry.content:
Hi all,

Our system version is ERP EHP8.

I have this request form client to disable the transport admin access from moving Transport Request to Production which owner is their own ID. At the same time, transport admin still can move transport to Production for others.

Is there a control that can be placed by identifying the user group to prevent certain user group from transporting their own transport to Production but can transport for other user group to Production?

 

Thanks.

Best regards,

Scott

entry.title: Re: SFTP Integrations and APIs error
entry.content: Yes

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI - RFC Adapter IFlow for Synchronous Communication
entry.content:
Hello,

Select subaccount --> click on cloud to on-premise --> add system in access control --> back-end type = ABAP system

Can you upload the screenshot for this path, I can not find it.

entry.title: Re: No run steps visible in sap cpi trace
entry.content: Its a known issue, which SAP is working on. Apparently , it is causing on standard Iflows , you coud trace on custom Iflows, if you want to trace the standard iflows copy them and trace it for temporarily

entry.title: Re: Unable to Find SDK Version 24.11 in Mobile Cloud Build?
entry.content: @Sourabh1 Good news, MDK SDK 24.11 is now available on cloud build service.

entry.title: Re: why changes made to IDOC_DATA in exit_sapliedp_001 is not retained?
entry.content: Have you activated the exit?

entry.title: Re: MDK BAS Version vs Mobile Cloud Build SDK Version
entry.content: @Angelo_Ab Good news, MDK SDK 24.11 is now available on cloud build service.

entry.title: Difference between Localization as a Self-Service and Configuration through CBC
entry.content:
Dear All

We have copied Germany Best Practices to Bahrain using Localization. Can you please confirm below mentioned queries.

  1. We can perform, Key User Extensibility, Developer Extensibility, Side-by-Side Extensibility without using CLT, Localization Tool Kit whereas SAP Documentation Localization as Self Service also mentioning extensibility as a capability of Localization. How we will differentiate the extensibility performed through Localization or without Localization as SAP does not support changes performed through localization.
  2. If we have to create new document types or extend any configuration by copying standard configuration as we usually do in Rise or On-Prem, will it be considered as Localization or violation of SAP Best Practices.

entry.title: Re: 收货的分录中，存货科目的利润中心是判断什么自动带出的？
entry.content:
Hi,

收货凭证的利润中心通常是由物料主数据的利润中心派生过来的。

可以通过应用程序-管理产品主数据 (App ID F1602)的成本1视图查看。

请参考下图(举例)：

 

Kind Regards,

Lucy

entry.title: Re: Standard fields in acedoca table missing in public cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

Checking into ACDOCA table in S/4HANA OP, the fields are not included in the table by default.

Please refer to following guidance for ACDOCA extensibility options to add the custom fields,

https://s4hanaguide.com/s4hana-acdoca-extensibility-guide/

Following Help Portal Documentation link is also helpful if you need the extensibility with Custom Fields,

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0fa84c9d9c634132b7c4abb9ffdd8f06/723eadddb3da43d19c1e17cfe7ef4a76.html

Kind Regards,

Lucy

entry.title: WEEX 推荐代码：3AND - 新用户注册奖励
entry.content:
2024 年的 WEEX 推荐代码为 3AND。在注册期间使用此代码，您可以享受 50% 的交易费折扣，从而降低您在平台上的成本。此外，您还将获得独家促销奖励，注册奖励高达 20,000 USDT。通过存款，您可以进一步增加奖励，获得高达 20,300 USDT 的注册奖励。

entry.title: Kod Rujukan WEEX: 3AND - Bonus Pendaftaran Pengguna Baharu
entry.content:
Kod rujukan WEEX untuk 2024 ialah 3AND. Dengan menggunakan kod ini semasa pendaftaran, anda boleh menikmati diskaun 50% untuk yuran dagangan, mengurangkan kos anda di platform. Selain itu, anda akan membuka kunci ganjaran promosi eksklusif dengan sehingga 20,000 USDT sebagai bonus pendaftaran. Dengan membuat deposit, anda boleh meningkatkan lagi ganjaran anda, menerima sehingga 20,300 USDT dalam bonus pendaftaran.

Dengan membuat deposit, anda boleh meningkatkan lagi ganjaran anda, menerima sehingga 20,300 USDT dalam bonus pendaftaran.

Selain itu, anda akan membuka kunci ganjaran promosi eksklusif dengan sehingga 20,000 USDT sebagai bonus pendaftaran. Dengan membuat deposit, anda boleh meningkatkan lagi ganjaran anda, menerima sehingga 20,300 USDT dalam bonus pendaftaran.

entry.content:
2024 年的 WEEX 推薦代碼是 3AND。註冊時使用此代碼，您可以享受50%的交易費用折扣，降低您在平台上的成本。此外，您還將獲得高達 20,000 USDT 的獨家促銷獎勵作為開卡獎勵。透過存款，您可以進一步增加您的獎勵，獲得高達 20,300 USDT 的開卡獎金。

entry.title: Hello I am Ramkumar
entry.content:
I have been part of the SAP community before in 2017. And then there was a pause. I have transitioned to a new role as a researcher in University -Industry collaboration. I been a SAP r/3 implementer and an end user for about 3 years way back in 2001.  Those experiences gave me a strong foundation in ERP systems and business processes. Over time, I moved into management roles in top corporations across the globe, gaining a wealth of cross-functional expertise. 

Now, I have come back and thrilled to be engaged with  this community. My new areas of interest include Sustainability, Corporate social responsibility and Environment conservation topics that resonate deeply with my personal values and professional aspirations.

It feels great to be back among like-minded professionals, sharing knowledge, learning together, and working toward meaningful goals. Thank you.

Cheers. Ramkumar

entry.title: Bitunix 推薦碼：TOPTOP - 高達 5500 USDT
entry.content:
利用 Bitunix 推薦碼：TOPTOP 並解鎖高達 5500 USDT 作為歡迎獎金！ Bitunix 是首屈一指的加密貨幣平台，以其先進的工具、低廉的費用和頂級的安全性而聞名。了解如何使用推薦代碼並開始領取獎勵。

如何取得 Bitunix 推薦碼？

前往 Bitunix 網站或應用程式：造訪網站或下載 Bitunix 應用程式。
建立新帳戶：輸入您的詳細訊息，包括您的電子郵件或手機號碼。
輸入 Bitunix 推薦碼：出現提示時，請使用 TOPTOP 解鎖您的獎金。
驗證您的帳戶：完成 KYC 以確認您的身份並啟動您的獎金。
領取獎金：註冊後，查看可用優惠並獲得高達 5500 USDT 的獎勵。

 

利用 Bitunix 推薦碼：TOPTOP 並解鎖高達 5500 USDT 作為歡迎獎金！ Bitunix 是首屈一指的加密貨幣平台，以其先進的工具、低廉的費用和頂級的安全性而聞名。了解如何使用推薦代碼並開始領取獎勵。

建立新帳戶：輸入您的詳細訊息，包括您的電子郵件或手機號碼。
輸入 Bitunix 推薦碼：出現提示時，請使用 TOPTOP 解鎖您的獎金。
驗證您的帳戶：完成 KYC 以確認您的身份並啟動您的獎金。
領取獎金：註冊後，查看可用優惠並獲得高達 5500 USDT 的獎勵。

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI for Java 8.10 on the Horizon
entry.content:
Hi @RMW 

I am trying to download latest SAP GUI for JAVA and seeing below error. I am logged in as an S User.

Please help/guide me...

No JAVA version available in software centre.

Thanks-

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI JAVA version 8 or higher not able to download
entry.content:
Hi,

I am able to download SAP GUI JAVA 8.0 using below URL. Posting just in case any one needs.

https://launchpad.support.sap.com/?sap-ui-language=en-US&sap-ui-theme=sap_fiori_3&help-theme=horizon&sap-support-iframe-issue=20263#/softwarecenter/template/products/_APP=00200682500000001943&_EVENT=DISPHIER&HEADER=Y&FUNCTIONBAR=N&EVENT=TREE&NE=NAVIGATE&ENR=73555000100200019714&V=MAINT 

Thanks-

entry.title: Re: Error in Sales order with TM
entry.content: thank you so much for responding however i cannot see te note you sent- i get No data Unable to fetch data at the moment. This might be due to a server error or a network issue. Please try again later. error while clicking on the link

entry.title: Re: How to use the OData Client Proxy in SAP S/4 HANA or How to use the OData Service Consumption Mo
entry.content: Great blog. Thank you for sharing.

entry.title: Re: Insert text type and content in notes tab in Edit Fre...
entry.content:
Hello @DominikTylczyn, thank you for your reply. I was able to solve the first part of the problem using get_assigned_fus association while using the retrieve_by_association method with the FO number. 

For the second problem, I find the helper class /scmtms/cl_txc_helper. But it didn't work as expected. It only worked when i try to insert text in notes tab for a freight order. But it doesn't work in case of freight unit. Can you please help me with this if there is any other specific class for freight units. Please let me know if more info is required. Thank you in advance.  

Best regards  

Rohit

entry.title: Re: Plant specific email output
entry.content: Please close the thread if you feel your query is answered by any of us.

entry.title: Re: Liquidity Assignment for SO, MM, FI and Treasury in S/4 HANA Cash Management
entry.content:
Hello @Vibha_Tiwary 

I have one question in the Purchase Cycles. 

For Purchase Order and Goods Receipt (MIGO), we can use Queries (Origin X) to populate the Liquidity Item. (MM Flow Builder will populate the values into 

For MIRO (This data needs to be triggered through FI Flow Builder), i am unable to figure out how to get the liquidity item. 

I will explain my requirement in more detail.

Business Case (simple example)

Material A needs to be treated as Liquidity Item A (Operating Exp 1) and Material B needs to be treated as Liquidity Item B (Operating Exp 2). This can be achieved using Queries (Origin X).

For MIRO, the Accounting Entry would be GR/IR Acc Dr, Vendor Acc Cr. For Vendor Line item we can get the Liquidity Item using Queries (Origin C), but how to get the Liquidity Item for GR/IR Account.  Using a default in FLQINFACC will not give me correct representation (as shown above, liquidity item needs to change based on Material). Request your help for the same.

What is SAP's solution for deriving Liquidity Item in MIRO transaction (which needs to derive based on the contents of the Purchase Order)

Thanks & Regards

Surya

entry.title: Why difference between production and quality system quantity.
entry.content:
Quality system

 

Production system

Quantity 18 in quality system and 0.001 in Production. Any reason please advise path where to check and all.

entry.title: Re: sap cap xs-security grant authorities for various app...
entry.content: Hello. Please validate grant-as-authority-to-apps entries and UAA client IDs and use cf oauth-token to inspect tokens and ensure the correct audience and scopes. Bind all relevant UAA services to both app and srv. Also add UAA services incrementally to isolate issues. If you still run in this issue, share relevant server logs for deeper debugging and may open a support ticket.

entry.title: Re: How to Handle Mass Role "assign site" in workzone
entry.content:
You could try to do this using the api’s in the meanwhile. I once made a script to create and assign user groups to role collections based on an excel but assigning the roles to the site was already done.

The excel was an export of the single roles exposed to workzone mapped to the composite role. So in the end we had a ias/cis user group for each composite role. Both were connected in idm.

entry.title: Re: SAP Work Zone: Fiori app not visible in Content Manag...
entry.content: Any luck in the meantime? If it is still not working , can you try deleting workzone and start over ? I guess is wrong with your instance.

entry.title: How to change Control Account in SAP Business One During Outgoing Payment based on AP Invoices
entry.content:
Dears,

Wish all have a good day

Please, help in this case

I was posted AP Invoices with Old Control Account on BP Master Data

After this i was changed Control Account to new control account in BP Master Data and make this old control account inactive

Issue is when make outgoing payment based on Old AP Invoices with old control account

i can't because old control account is inactive and if i converted old control account to active

Transactions of outgoing payment go to old control account and i want transactions go to new control account

 

Please, advice or workaround

Many Thanks

entry.title: Re: ABAP 7.5x Quick Reference
entry.content: Thanks @Sandra_Rossi . I'll have a look at that section and sort it out. 👍

entry.title: Re: Accessing $skip/$top inside Odata Batch requests in C...
entry.content:
You can find them in the query:

const skip = req.query.SELECT.limit?.offset?.val
const top = req.query.SELECT.limit?.rows?.val

entry.title: Re: Building Block for Attachments not working in UI5
entry.content: Can you share some details on the version of ui5?

entry.title: Error 403 when Create Sales Order using API_SALES_ORDER_SRV
entry.content:
Hi everyone, I need help. I face issues creating Sales Orders using API_SALES_ORDER_SRV from an External Application (in this case, Dynamics 365 Business Central).

I am trying to create a new sales order from an external application built in Microsoft Dynamics Business Central. I successfully retrieve sales order data using the GET method using the same service

endpoint (/A_SalesOrder). However, when I attempt to create a new sales order, I receive a "403 Forbidden" error message.

I have verified that the username and password for Basic Authorization are correct, and I have included the X-CSRF-Token in the header of my request. What confuses me is that I can successfully create a new sales order using Postman.

Could you help me understand why this might be happening?

Here is my payload to Create new Sales Order:

{
    "SalesOrderType": "OR",
    "SalesOrganization": "SBY", 
    "DistributionChannel": "SL", 
    "OrganizationDivision": "SL", 
    "PriceDetnExchangeRate": "1.00000",
    "SoldToParty": "1000347", 
    "TotalNetAmount": "500.00",
    "PurchaseOrderByCustomer": "Test SO (Integration)",
    "TransactionCurrency": "USD", 
    "IncotermsClassification": "EXW", 
    "IncotermsTransferLocation": "Palo Alto", 
    "CustomerAccountAssignmentGroup": "01",
    "CustomerGroup": "01",
    "CustomerPaymentTerms": "0004", 
    "to_Item": {
        "results": [
            {
                "SalesOrderItem": "10",
                "SalesOrderItemCategory": "TAN",
                "SalesOrderItemText": "Barang Ariel",
                "PurchaseOrderByCustomer": "Test so",
                "Material": "CAU0099",
                "RequestedQuantity": "20",
                "RequestedQuantityUnit": "PC",
                "ConfdDelivQtyInOrderQtyUnit": "2",
                "NetAmount": "500.00",
                "MaterialGroup": "L004",
                "ProductionPlant": "GON",
                "StorageLocation": "GON1",
                "ShippingPoint": "GOSP",
                "DeliveryPriority": "1",
                "DeliveryDateQuantityIsFixed": false,
                "IncotermsClassification": "EXW",
                "IncotermsTransferLocation": "Palo Alto",
                "IncotermsLocation1": "Palo Alto",
                "MatlAccountAssignmentGroup": "03",
                "CustomerPaymentTerms": "0004",
                "CustomerGroup": "01",
                "ProfitCenter": "MJK",
                "Subtotal1Amount": "500.00",
                "Subtotal2Amount": "500.00",
                "Subtotal3Amount": "500.00",
                "to_PricingElement": {
                    "results": [
                        {
                            "ConditionType": "PPR0",
                            "ConditionRateValue": "500.00",
                            "ConditionCurrency": "USD",
                            "ConditionQuantity": "20",
                            "ConditionQuantityUnit": "PC"
                        }
                    ]
                }
            }
        ]
    }
}

Here is my request using Postman

entry.title: Re: Can we integrate of React framework into SAP UI5 fram...
entry.content: That is a good idea! If you expose it as a web component, the technology behind doesn’t matter.

entry.title: web client sap b1 public view or Analysis for all user
entry.content:
How to public analysis view for all user?
Scenario, I have make 1 User define query in web client. I want all user or some one user can access

entry.title: Re: FSCM - Credit Limit Requests Approval using Manage Credit Management Rules
entry.content:
Hello @darrelzaulda 

Thank you so much for your blog and it is really very very useful for my project. 

Regards,
Paran

entry.title: Re: why changes made to IDOC_DATA in exit_sapliedp_001 is not retained?
entry.content: Did you debug it to make sure that the IDOC_DATA[] is changed as you expect?

entry.title: Re: Get the data from RFC BAPI Result
entry.content:
BAPIs are just synchronous real-time data exchange, and they are not monitored. If you want to monitor the data flow (inbound or outbound), you can use IDocs/ ALE technology. IDocs are monitored in transaction WE05.

Some BAPIs even have an equivalent IDoc interface, for example for Sales Orders, there are IDoc types ORDERS, ORDCHG and ORDRSP available. However, sending & receiving IDocs is much more difficult than simply calling a BAPI, so probably your third party application is not capable of doing that.

entry.title: Re: Improve Community 2024 feed to append "and X other people" to "mentioned you&quot
entry.content: "You can turn off being tagged globally", via Settings > Subscriptions & Notifications > Notification Settings > Notify me of > Posts I'm @mentioned in:

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Architecture Guide
entry.content: Amazing blog ! Thanks for the effort in providing much useful info.

entry.title: Re: Why difference between production and quality system quantity.
entry.content: Obviously, because data is different between production and quality. Sorry to say that, but if you expect a better answer, analyze first at your side and provide more information than just "[why do I have] 18 in quality system and 0.001 in Production".

entry.title: quality stock
entry.content:
hello dear's 

I have an issue 

1 - I have material x in sto 001 under quality inspection..... I need to transfer material x from storage 001 to storage 002 under quality inspection in two steps in MM

we already active QM can someone help me with this cycle 

thanks

entry.title: Re: tcode/report for sales invoices list
entry.content: Hi Lakshmi, how to see all today's invoices, it is not showing in VF05N. please suggest

entry.title: Re: Is Emergency Cover feature in nominations reportable?
entry.content:
yes, you can report on the emergency cover using story report.
The field is available in the table "Nomination Information".
See attached

entry.title: Re: Time off Story report data access for manager - Targe...
entry.content:
Hello 

if you are starting your data source with table such as Employee time object, If the object is not secured based on the target population (See attached), the user running the reports will be able to see all the data if has access to view the object.

please see 2594455 - Report built on Absence Request (Time Off) does not respect Role Based Permission (RBP) - Report Canvas - SAP for Me which explain the similar issue. Also see 3475150 - How to restrict target for MDF object using "CREATE Respects Target Criteria" field - SAP for Me 

To resolve this, either make sure the object is secured with target criteria or start your report with table such as Job information which are restricted by RBP target criteria for users

entry.title: Installation Problem SAP Hana Express Edition
entry.content:
Good afternoon,

I'm trying to Install SAP Hana Express Edition on Redhat 9.5, but I get the above Error.

Where can I get this package ?

Kind Regards

Michael

Here the Repos. InstallMedia is the Redhat rhel-saphana-9.5-x86_64-dvd.iso.

The system is running as Hyper-V - VM.

entry.title: Re: Transfer Manager functionality in Settlement Management
entry.content:
Hi,

Can you specify how "The transfer rule 78 - Accounting Accruals Line Billing Doc is not about the settlement document though. It concerns the accruals posted in the SD-Billing document and it is something, often requested by business." must be completed to reverse the accruals from billing?

entry.content:
Hi @Sathish_Kumar_BP , @SathishKumarBP 

I am getting empty entry nodes after mapping simulation
How can i fix this?

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA aATP Supply creation-Based Confirmation (SBC) Series Part 4 - Complex Use Case
entry.content:
@kovacsan  Excellent blog and use case. 

I tried the similar scenario with class type 023. However, configuration profile cant be created with type 023 (atleast in my System). Without the Config. Profile, items in sales order cant be configured. Did you find a work around or am I missing something?

Thanks

Nik

entry.title: Consecuences of activating obsolete REPORTS? Is there any casuistics about it?
entry.content:
Greetings community,

As you know, in ECC, the transaction F.75/F_75 exists (and still works) and is considered obsolete in the S4H environment. However, there's a procedure that can be used to reactivate it, even though SAP clearly states that they won't be responsible for any system crashes that occur as a result of reactivating obsolete programs.

The question is: If a company executes this report, what tangible error has actually been reported due to activating this or, in general, any other obsolete REPORT?

Thanks for your comments!

entry.title: Can we change the internal table data structure using Javascript?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We require Fragmented-based Adobe forms to change the layout and make some calculations as below.

Requirement Explanation in detail.

1. Table 1(Raw Data) shows the possible cases of materials packed in handling units. There is a chance of mixed cases as shown(ie., Multiple materials can be packed in a single pallet).

2. Table 2 - Format provided by Standard output type(DELIVERY_PACKING_LIST). Handling units followed by Materials packed.

3. Table 3 - Format required for our client to transpose the data and display it in the form.

 

Existing format provided in SAP Public cloud 
Handling UnitsMaterialQtyGross WeightGross Volume
HU1  50100
 33000018410  
HU2  50100
 33000018420  
HU3  50100
 33000018510  
HU4  50100
 33000018610  
HU5  50100
 33000018710  
 33000018815  
HU6  50100
 33000018920  
HU7  50100
 33000018910  
HU8  50100
 33000018910  
HU9  50100
 33000018910  
HU10  50100
 330000190
330000191		10
15		  

The required format for our client is as follows.

Kindly suggest.

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: How to restrict outbound delivery with respect to serial numbers
entry.content:
I did quality inspection for 3 finished goods, 2 Accepted(posted to unrestricted use) and 1 rejected (posted to blocked stock).
Unrestricted Use - EKON001 & EKON002 (Serial numbers)
Blocked Stock - EKON003 (Serial numbers)
SD team did the sales delivery for 2 qty (Picked EKON001 & EKON003), Although the EKON003 - serial number is blocked they can able to do the delivery!
Then I checked the stock overview EKON002 comes under the blocked stock, This leads to error of delivering defected material to customer.
How to restrict the sales delivery with respect to serial number?
SAP Community 
UI SAP GUI for Windows

entry.title: Re: The quantity of role "Load" is greater than the deliv...
entry.content:
Hello , 

Try to repack  if deliveries involved with HU's from PRDO --> Follow on actions--> Pack  screen . 

Regards,

entry.title: How to restrict the sales delivery with respect to serial number
entry.content:
I did quality inspection for 3 finished goods, 2 Accepted(posted to unrestricted use) and 1 rejected (posted to blocked stock).
Unrestricted Use - EKON001 & EKON002 (Serial numbers)
Blocked Stock - EKON003 (Serial numbers)
SD team did the sales delivery for 2 qty (Picked EKON001 & EKON003), Although the EKON003 - serial number is blocked they can able to do the delivery!
Then I checked the stock overview EKON002 comes under the blocked stock, This leads to error of delivering defected material to customer.
How to restrict the sales delivery with respect to serial number?
SAP Community

entry.title: Re: error handling on process automation BPA with NO RPA
entry.content:
Hello, 

My suggestion is to handle the response itself by adding "conditions". Then perform the necessary steps required for your process like "Raise Alerts", "Send Email" or Add another "Process" that will process your exception. 🙂 

I hope it helps. 

Regards

-weisson

entry.title: Re: SAP BPA Error while passing payload using postman - p...
entry.content: Hello,

entry.title: Printing setup in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
How do we do printing and what kind of setup needs to be done?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Printing setup in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Please follow the 1LQ set up guide: https://support.sap.com/content/dam/SAAP/Sol_Pack/Library/Setup/1LQ_Set-Up_EN_XX.pdf

--See Also--

SAP Help - Document and Output Management

2941522 - Output Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - Guided Answer

3223182 - Mandatory DKIM setup - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Spotkanie Katowickiej Grupy SAP Community - Listopad 2024
entry.content:
Za nami już ostatni SAP Stammtisch w 2024 roku!

Tym razem spotkaliśmy się w pubie Biała Małpa, lecz docelowo nie będzie to nasze miejsce spotkań, ponieważ w planach jest, by następne nasze spotkanie odbyło się w CyberTap w Katowicach.
Wydarzenie jest już dodane do kalendarza katowickiej Grupy, więc serdecznie zapraszamy do zgłaszania chęci uczestnictwa tutaj: katowice-sap-stammtisch-08-01-2025 

Cieszymy się, że na ostatnim spotkaniu Grupy dołączyły do nas osoby spoza regionu. Serdecznie pozdrawiamy Kraków i Poznań oraz zapraszamy ponownie 🙂
Każde spotkanie Grupy SAP Community Katowice, to zawsze ciekawe doświadczenie dla każdego uczestnika. Dlatego też cieszymy się, gdy poza znajomym kręgiem osób pracującym w technologii SAP, pojawia się ktoś nam nieznany, bo takie spotkania zawsze owocują nawiązaniem nowych znajomości oraz uświadamiają, że Świat SAPa, wcale nie jest taki wielki jak może się wydawać i gdzieś w naszej wędrówce zawodowej jest duża szansa przecięcia się z ciekawymi osobami, których spotkało na różnych eventach i z którymi ma się coś wspólnego.
Przyznacie, że ostatnie zdanie wyszło bardzo złożone współrzędnie, więc teraz podsumuję bardzo krótko.


Tak jak zawsze, ostatni SAP Stammtisch w Katowicach można śmiało zaliczyć do udanych 🙂

   

Następny SAP Stammtisch już 8 stycznia. Jak zwykle zapraszamy Was do wcześniejszych zapisów, co pomaga w rezerwacji odpowiedniej wielkości stolika i zachęca innych do przyjścia 🙂

entry.title: Re: Error auto cert refresh failed with response code 503...
entry.content:
Hi,
  
Hope you are doing good.

Yes, we are aware of this cockpit bug. You can ignore this Cockpit UI error message/ it does not affect the actual functionality.
It is caused by an internal program error and does not have an effect on your BTP cloud connectivity which still works normal. We are already working on a hotfix to prevent this error message from being displayed. In this case it is just a false alert and will disappear soon after patching from our side.

Apologies for any inconvenience caused.

 _ _ _ _ _ __ _ _ 
Kind Regards,
Hemanth Kumar
SAP Product Support
 _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _

entry.title: Re: Transport SAC excel addin reports from dev system to...
entry.content:
@Chanti 

Currently SAC Excel Add-in template are not transportable. You need to save the templates individually in each tenant.

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

entry.title: "Time valuation trace" documentation?
entry.content: Under Manage Data there is a "Time Valuation Trace" object. I tried playing around with it, but I can't figure out how to use it. And I can't find documentation using the search term "Time Valuation Trace". I have tried this community, Time Tracking Implementation Guide, Time Tracking Operation Guide, Me.SAP.com, and Perplexity/Google.  Can anyone point me to a how-to guide for this tool?

entry.title: Re: Electronic Invoices for Malaysia: A Guide for Communication Settings
entry.content:
Hi Alice,

thank you for this helpful blog! When registering on the MyInvois Portal you get the client-ID, client secret 1 and client secret 2 --> which secret do we need to enter in the BTP app "Manage communication settings"?

Thanks!

Best regards,
Gerhard

entry.title: How can I create a view of a customer's payment history?
entry.content: I need help to create a view in SQL to get all the information about customers' payment history and their debts, including additional information such as the outstanding balance, the date the debt was acquired, and the due date of the debt.

entry.title: Unable to Create Target Table in SAP Datasphere: Error The target table 'Table 1' is not created an
entry.content:
Dear Experts

I am currently learning SAP Datasphere and working on a dataflow that involves tables from an SAP ECC system. While attempting to create and deploy the target table "Table 1," I encountered the following error:

The target table "Table 1" is not created and deployed.

Additionally, when I remove the target table, I receive this error:

The operator "Join 5" has unconnected input/output.

I have ensured that all joins are configured correctly and the source tables (VBAK, VBAP, MARA, MARC, KNA1, and ADRC) are loaded properly. However, I am stuck at this stage and unable to proceed with creating and deploying the target table.

Can someone guide me on how to resolve this issue? Are there any specific steps or configurations

Priyanka

entry.title: Re: Download link for 'SAP Crystal Reports for Visual Stu...
entry.content:
Problem solved by copying the hyperlink to a Brave browser instead of Chrome.
Strange, but I don't argue with success.

entry.title: Re: SAP BPA Error while passing payload using postman - p...
entry.content: @arroyoweisson Did you need something?

Want to change domain and host on SAP BTP - IS - tenant

entry.title: Re: Request to change hostname and domain on SAP BTP Inte...
entry.content:
Hello,

You can follow this KBA to configure a Custom Domain for Integration Suite:

3453093 - Configuring custom domains in Integration Suite

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Electronic Invoices for Malaysia: A Guide for Communication Settings
entry.content: Hi, @gerhardhoebinger looks like either one works. We are using secret 1, but I just tried secret 2 using POSTMAN and I could get an access token too.

entry.title: Service procurement in sap S4/HANA
entry.content:
Hi all, 

Can anyone explain for me What is the Difference Between External Service Management and Lean Service Procurement, and How Do You Decide Which One to Use?

Thanks in advance.

happy coding and keep enjoying UI5 front-end development

entry.title: Re: Unable to Create Target Table in SAP Datasphere: Erro...
entry.content:
Hi Priyanka,

It seems that there are no issues with regard to the inputs for "Join 5." In order to load the data, it is necessary to connect a table as a target. Here similar question was answered by Thore.

Thanks,
Tuncay

entry.title: Re: SAP License Clarification for Two Different Localization in Same Server
entry.content: Hi Does SAP B1 Cloud License (partner hosted) Provided by SAP has multi localization ???

entry.title: Re: Error auto cert refresh failed with response code 503...
entry.content: Wow is it really a bug on BTP Cockpit? It's kind to inform everyone. Thanks so much, Hemanth!

entry.title: Re: Right Click Menu not visible in Dispatcher
entry.content: Hi Dispatcher is a SAP application which renders sap client on browser, we loged a ticket to sap and as per the reply this is a bug which is there in this version and got fixed in the latest patch

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere - Usage of Meta Chain
entry.content:
Hello @Thibault_dockx 

I agree to Martin Kreitlein. 

Also, what if you need a step to follow a second step and the first fails. Everything stops, rt? 

Dependencies? How do you handle them? 

I found only CLI as alternative. 

Thanks,

Martin

entry.title: Re: How to find data source, extractor, CDS views for tim...
entry.content:
I just happened to provide these details to a friend. There is quite some blogs about CDS Views and how to find / identify them. 

Here some links. Please check the forum for rest

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/c0c54048d35849128be8e872df5bea6d/5418de55938d1d22e10000000a44147b.html

On a silver plate blog:  https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/finding-the-right-cds-extractor-in-sap-s-4hana/ba-p/13521296

entry.title: Re: Help with reporting layout in SAP Datasphere/ Analyti...
entry.content:
Hi, did you try to suppress via a script for the table? 

DSP with SAC -> a lot of functionalities one has in BW cannot be done id DSP self, but can be easily done in SAC via scripting. You can suppress dimensions or measures, add / remove them / ... via scripting.

entry.title: Re: Event consumption model for custom RAP events created...
entry.content:
Hi Saurabh,

Good question! I checked the two tutorials you mentioned, and it looks like you can consume custom RAP events from S/4HANA Private Cloud in a SAP BTP ABAP environment.

There might be a few details to work out, but give this a try as a way of building on what you've already figured out:

  1. How to Create RAP Business Events in an On-Premise system - Steps 8 - 11
  2. Event Consumption in SAP BTP, ABAP Environment - Steps 4 - 10

Thanks,
Tuncay
